name: Mike M.
text: We hired AccuRite, in the fall of 2010, to do the excavation on our new home in Huntsville. They did a fantastic job. They treated us fairly and honestly. They have a good reputation with everyone I have spoken with. I highly recommend them.

name: Ryan
text: I first found out about Accurite Excavation & Hauling through a friend of mine that had some dirt removal done. I called Shawn and got a quote on retaining walls, and had Accurite Excavation & Hauling come out. Very impressed with the honesty and hard work. I would highly recommend them!

name: Travis
text: I feel very comfortable using Accurite, they do a great job never cutting corners and are very trustworthy, lucky to have family owned businesses that are dependable and good work to help build and give back to their community.

name: Kelly W.
text: Accurite gave us a fair quote and finished ahead of schedule.

name: Brandon S.
text: Shawn and his crew did our basement excavation and backfill. They showed up on time every day and communicated everything clearly. The site was cleaned up before they left each afternoon. Best excavation company we've worked with in Weber County.

name: Jennifer H.
text: AccuRite installed our septic system in Huntsville. Shawn walked us through the entire process from the perc test to the final inspection. Everything passed on the first try. Very professional and reasonably priced.

name: Derek L.
text: We've used AccuRite on multiple commercial projects and they always deliver. Their equipment is well-maintained and the operators are skilled. Shawn is easy to work with and keeps projects on schedule. Our go-to excavation sub.

name: Lisa R.
text: Had a boulder retaining wall built along our hillside property. AccuRite did an incredible job with the placement and drainage. It's been through two winters now and looks just as solid as the day it was built. Couldn't be happier.
